auditions-active-text: Auditions for the 2025-2026 school year will take place from Saturday, September 27th to Monday, September 29th. Callbacks will take place on Tuesday, September 30th by invitation only. We can't wait to hear you sing!
auditions-inactive-text: Auditions for the 2025-2026 school year have ended, but check back later for updates about auditioning for us next year!
